name: cold_start_from_zero_baseline
description: First cycle of the trading day: prev_return defaults to 0.0 (no prior tick), current_return jumps to 5.0 on the open print. velocity = 5.0, well above threshold; arms. Pins the cold-start behavior at session start when bot_state has no prev_return entry yet (inline uses .get("prev_return", current_return), but for the EXTRACTED pure function the caller passes whatever default they choose; this fixture pins the 0.0-baseline interpretation).
derivation: velocity = current_return - prev_return = 5.0 - 0.0 = 5.0. should_arm = (velocity >= para_threshold) AND (not currently_armed) = (5.0 >= 0.5) AND (not False) = True AND True = True.
